transcript.final_response:
Done — I joined the files on `department_id`, created `/data/report.csv` with the requested columns and header, and printed it:

```csv
name,department_name,salary
Alice,Engineering,120000
Bob,Marketing,95000
Carol,Engineering,115000
Dave,Sales,88000
Eve,Marketing,92000
```
tool_calls: ls -l /data && echo '--- employees.csv ---' && sed -n '1,5p' /data/employees.csv && echo '--- departments.csv ---' && sed -n '1,5p' /data/departments.csv

awk -F',' 'NR==FNR{if(FNR>1) dept[$1]=$2; next} FNR==1{print "name,department_name,salary"; next} {print $1","dept[$2]","$3}' /data/departments.csv /data/employees.csv > /data/report.csv
cat /data/report.csv

tool_outputs.commands: ls -l /data && echo '--- employees.csv ---' && sed -n '1,5p' /data/employees.csv && echo '--- departments.csv ---' && sed -n '1,5p' /data/departments.csv
tool_outputs.stdout:

-rw-r--r--       93 2026-07-12 00:33 employees.csv

name,department_id,salary
Alice,1,120000
Bob,2,95000
Carol,1,115000
Dave,3,88000
--- departments.csv ---
department_id,department_name
1,Engineering
2,Marketing
3,Sales

tool_outputs.commands:
awk -F',' 'NR==FNR{if(FNR>1) dept[$1]=$2; next} FNR==1{print "name,department_name,salary"; next} {print $1","dept[$2]","$3}' /data/departments.csv /data/employees.csv > /data/report.csv
cat /data/report.csv
